breaking.title: Venezuela earthquake LIVE updates: Death toll climbs to 235
breaking.summary: The number of dead and injured is expected to rise with thousands reported missing after the 7.2- and 7.5-magnitude earthquakes

breaking.title: Philippines temporarily blocks gaming app used by suspect in deadly school shooting
breaking.summary: Three students were killed, and 20 others were wounded when the two suspects, aged 14 and 15 and armed with a handgun each, opened fire June 22 at the San Jose National High School in central Tacloban city

breaking.title: From baby to dog: Miracle rescues giving Venezuela hope after deadly earthquakes - watch
breaking.summary: Amidst the devastation of twin earthquakes in Venezuela, remarkable rescues are offering glimmers of hope. Emergency workers and citizens are tirelessly searching for survivors beneath collapsed buildings, with a baby and a 12-year-old boy among those miraculously pulled to safety. These uplifting moments contrast sharply with the rising death toll and widespread destruction, as international aid begins to arrive.

breaking.title: UN pauses Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan after cargo ship attacked
breaking.summary: The ship was reportedly struck by an "unknown projectile" near Oman but no casualties were reported.

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: 'Very strong' nuclear verification needed in Iran after war, says IAEA head
breaking.summary: Attack on ship in Hormuz leads UN to halt evacuation plan for trapped sailors

breaking.title: Ukraine hits Russian chemical plant again, reports say, in heavy overnight drone attack
breaking.summary: Regional governor Dmitry ‌Milyayev said an industrial facility in Novomoskovsk, 200 km (125 miles) south of ‌Moscow, had been damaged

breaking.title: Four from Markapuram killed, six injured as SUV hits parked lorry on Macherla-Veldurthi highway
breaking.summary: The SUV, carrying members of a family from Markapuram to Pamuru, hit a lorry parked after a tyre burst on the Macherla-Veldurthi highway in Palnadu

breaking.title: Trump allies defend him to Israelis anxious over Iran deal
breaking.summary: The U.S.-Israeli relationship has been on a roller coaster, from the ​early confidence they shared after their joint attack on Iran to public disagreements between Donald Trump and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu over how ⁠to end the four-month-old war
